articles.title: Welcome to Daily News Hub
articles.summary: This is sample content. After GitHub Actions runs, this file will be replaced with live RSS headlines from your selected sources.

articles.title: World headlines will appear here
articles.summary: The website is ready to display short summaries and source links from trusted feeds.

articles.title: Business news category
articles.summary: Use feeds.json to add or remove sources for business and finance updates.

articles.title: Sports headlines category
articles.summary: Sports RSS feeds can be added to the feed list and updated hourly.

articles.title: Technology headlines category
articles.summary: Technology updates can be shown here with links to the original publishers.

articles.title: Entertainment category
articles.summary: Add entertainment RSS feeds in feeds.json to activate this category.
